entries.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.
Thank you for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics.
Would you like to create a demo patient profile?
I just need your first and last name to get started.
Hey there! Sounds like you just made a loud noise, maybe clapping or something dropped, huh? Everything okay? Let me know how I can help!
Hi, I’d like to schedule a dermatology appointment, please. Could you help me find an available slot this week or next?
I am going to end the call now.
